prompt_text: Open source or affordable customer success tools instead of Gainsight
response:
# Open Source & Affordable Customer Success Alternatives

## Open Source Options

| Tool | Best For | Notes |
|------|----------|-------|
| **Plane** | Project/task management | Free, self-hosted alternative to Jira |
| **OpenCRM** | CRM functionality | Lightweight, self-hosted option |
| **Odoo** | Full business suite | Includes CRM, ticketing, surveys |
| **Metabase** | Analytics/dashboards | Excellent for customer data visualization |

## Affordable SaaS ($50-500/mo)

| Tool | Focus | Price Range |
|------|-------|-------------|
| **HubSpot (free tier)** | CRM + ticketing | Free - $120/mo |
| **Intercom** | Customer communication | $74+/mo |
| **Zendesk** | Support + ticketing | $19+/mo |
| **Freshdesk** | Ticketing + automation | $15+/mo |
| **Slack + Airtable** | DIY CS stack | $10-30/mo combined |

## DIY Approach (Most Affordable)

**Build with:**
- **Airtable** - Customer database & workflows
- **Zapier/Make** - Automation
- **Slack** - Notifications & alerts
- **Metabase** - Analytics
- **Google Sheets** - Health scoring

**Cost:** $50-100/mo | **Best for:** Early-stage, <100 customers

## Solid Mid-Market Options

- **Totango Lite** - Simplified feature set
- **Strikedeck** - Affordable, modern UI
- **Vitally** - Generous free tier

**What's your company size & budget? That'll help narrow the best fit.**
